_comment: Cline reads its `mcpServers` block from the VSCode extension settings JSON (Command Palette → 'Preferences: Open User Settings (JSON)'). Paste this snippet into `cline.mcpServers`. Cline supports both STDIO and HTTP transports; the example below shows STDIO.

oz-policy-builder._autoApprove_note: Per `plan.md` Phase 5 Stream D, leave `autoApprove` EMPTY. Every `export_policy` / `simulate_policy` / `record_transaction` invocation should surface to the human operator for review before running. Auto-approving tool calls defeats the purpose of the policy-builder safety story.
